title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: - High: [scheduler.py:485](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L485) and [scheduler.py:490](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L490) break quote tweets. `source_url` now always falls back into `reply_url`, then gets stripped from `post_text`, so the `x.com/.../status/...` URL is removed from the main post and sent as a reply instead. That kills the quote card and violates the repo rule that quote URLs stay in-body. - High: [scheduler.py:513](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L513) changes quote tweets into the normal posting path. If a quote-tweet draft ever has `image_path`, this code will post it with media instead of preserving the manual quote-tweet workflow, creating incorrect behavior and potential duplicate/accidental scheduler posting. - Low: [scheduler.py:51](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L51) now has unused imports (`extract_quote_tweet_id`, `has_quote_url`), and [scheduler.py:540](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L540) has stale comments that claim quote-tweet exclusion still exists. No distinct security issue found beyond this behavioral regression.
